requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL expose AI runtime work mode as a user-controlled state with exactly `build` and `plan` values.

case.given: A new or migrated AI runtime actor has no explicit manual work mode state
case.when: The actor work context is initialized
case.then: The system SHALL set work mode to `build`

case.given: The user enters `/work-mode plan` or `/work-mode build`
case.then: The system SHALL update actor work mode to the requested value
The command SHALL NOT be appended as semantic LLM conversation history
The command SHALL NOT trigger a provider completion request

case.when: The model attempts a file write, patch, edit, or destructive shell command
case.then: The system SHALL block or route the operation through the explicit permission policy before execution

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL expose AI runtime task phase as a model-declared state with exactly `normal` and `answer` values.

case.when: The runtime prepares actor work context
case.then: The system SHALL set task phase to `normal` unless a task phase tool call changes it

case.given: The model is ready to stop tool-driven work and produce a final answer
case.when: The model calls the task phase control tool with `phase=answer`
case.then: The system SHALL set actor task phase to `answer`
The tool SHALL NOT change work mode

case.when: The model calls a normal non-control tool
case.then: The system SHALL reset task phase to `normal` for that continued tool-driven work

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL remove legacy automatic work mode and task phase inference paths that conflict with explicit runtime control.

case.given: Runtime work context data is serialized, recovered, or migrated
case.when: Old work mode or task phase values are encountered
case.then: The system SHALL normalize them to `build` and `normal`
The system SHALL NOT expose old enum values to prompt planning or runtime policy

case.given: The model repeatedly calls tools, reads files, runs checks, or continues a turn
case.then: The system SHALL NOT switch work mode or task phase based on call counts, repeated tool counts, or iteration counts

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL keep work mode and task phase prompt guidance compact and outside stable provider prefix content.

case.given: A DeepSeek-family model uses provider-managed prefix cache
case.when: Work mode or task phase changes
case.then: The system SHALL NOT include those dynamic values in the stable prefix hash
The system SHALL materialize only a compact late runtime overlay for work mode and task phase
